Payer Category: Any employer

Payer Category: Trustees of EPF Scheme

Payer Category: Any payer

Notes: No threshold in all other cases.

Payer Category: Banking company / Co-op bank / Post office

Payer Category: Person responsible for paying

Notes: Deducted at end of FY or at withdrawal, whichever earlier.

Payer Category: Bookmaker or licence holder

Notes: Use whichever threshold is breached first (single or aggregate).

Payer Category: Same as above

Notes: Use whichever threshold is breached first.

Payer Category: Any person (other than Individual/HUF with turnover <= Rs 1Cr/50L in preceding FY)

Payer Category: Any person (other than Individual/HUF with turnover <= Rs 1Cr/50L in preceding FY)

Payer Category: Any person (other than Individual/HUF with turnover <= Rs 1Cr/50L in preceding FY)

Payer Category: Individual/HUF with turnover <= Rs 1Cr/50L in preceding FY

Payer Category: Individual/HUF with turnover <= Rs 1Cr/50L in preceding FY
